concerns.text: Task T021 [US1] is marked 'FAILED: unspecified' and lacks implementation details for the fuzzy-matching fallback required by FR-010. Without a defined logic for (artist, track, album) matching, the task cannot satisfy the spec requirement to handle missing MusicBrainz IDs.

Task T023 [US1] is unchecked and depends on T042. T042 (train_global_word2vec) is marked [X] but T023 (aggregate_yearly_embeddings) is missing. The spec requires yearly embeddings (US-1) to be generated; without T023, the downstream US-2 and US-3 cannot execute.

Task T029 [US3] is unchecked. It is required to generate 'excluded_years.json' which T030 depends on. Without T029, the regression task T030 cannot filter low-coverage years as mandated by the spec edge cases.

Task T030 [US3] is unchecked. It is the core implementation for FR-005 (linear regression). Its dependency on T029 (unchecked) and T026 (checked) creates a blockage. The task must be completed to satisfy SC-002.

Task T036b [US3] is unchecked. It implements the mandatory sensitivity sweep (FR-006, SC-003). The Plan waives this, but the Spec mandates it. The task exists but is incomplete, leaving the spec requirement unmet.

Task T031b (docstrings) and T032a/T032b (refactoring) are unchecked. While T032a/b are refactoring, T031b (docstrings) is a quality requirement for reproducibility (Constitution Principle I) and is currently missing implementation.
Task T017 references 'T039' as a dependency for ratification, but T039 is not defined in the task list. T016 mentions T039 as well. This creates a dangling reference to a non-existent task ID.

Task T017 depends on 'T016' for governance, but T016 is marked [X] (complete) while T017 is [X] (complete). However, the text says T017 'Depends on T016' but T016 is 'Document the Scope Deviation'. The dependency chain is logically sound but the task IDs for the Spec Amendment (T039) are missing from the list, creating a stale tag situation.
